sizing_rule.note: Van Tharp 1R methodology: predetermine max loss per trade (0.25% of account), then size position inversely using formula Account_Value × 0.25% / Distance_to_Stop to maintain consistent risk regardless of stop distance

source_rule_text: A trader must predetermine their maximum acceptable loss per trade (risk percentage) before entering a position, then size the position inversely to that risk to preserve capital.
